setting.label: Server Address
setting.help: The direct web address of your Emby server (e.g., https://yourdomain.com).

setting.label: Username
setting.help: Your Emby account username.

setting.label: Password
setting.help: Your Emby account password. Used securely to grab an internal API token.

setting.label: Internal Token
setting.help: Hidden system token.

setting.label: Internal UID
setting.help: Hidden system UID.

setting.label: Server Address
setting.help: The direct web address of your Jellyfin server.

setting.label: Username
setting.help: Your Jellyfin account username.

setting.label: Password
setting.help: Your Jellyfin account password.

setting.label: Internal Token
setting.help: Hidden system token.

setting.label: Internal UID
setting.help: Hidden system UID.

setting.label: Master Scoring Preset
setting.values: Auto Max (Best Overall)|Audiophile (Prioritize Audio)|Resolution (Prioritize 4K)|Remux (Prioritize Size/Bitrate)|1080p Focus (Standard HD)|Custom (Manual Tuning)
setting.help: Auto Max: Balanced High-End. Audiophile: Focuses on Atmos/TrueHD. Resolution/1080p: Locks video size. Remux: Largest file wins. Custom: Unlocks toggles below.

setting.label: [Custom Preset] Primary Metric
setting.help: Decide if the script bases its primary math on the video bitrate or the overall file size.

setting.label: [Custom Preset] Prioritize 4K Resolution
setting.help: Adds a massive score bonus to files with a 4K/2160p resolution.

setting.label: [Custom Preset] Prioritize Dolby Vision & HDR
setting.help: Adds a score bonus to files containing Dolby Vision or HDR formats.

setting.label: [Custom Preset] Prioritize Atmos/Lossless Audio
setting.help: Adds a score bonus to files with TrueHD, DTS-HD MA, or Atmos/DTS:X tracks.

setting.label: Max Resolution Limit
setting.help: Prevents the script from picking files larger than this resolution. Excellent for slow internet or older TVs.

setting.label: Max File Size (GB) [0 = No Limit]
setting.help: Filters out any files larger than this gigabyte size. Leave at 0 for no limit.

setting.label: Server Tie-Breaker Preference
setting.help: If both servers have identical files with the exact same score, which server wins automatically? If 'None', a menu will pop up.

setting.label: TMDB API Key (optional)
setting.help: Your own TMDB v3 API key. If blank, Source Engine borrows TMDb Helper's key automatically. Get one free at themoviedb.org.

setting.label: Text Color Theme
setting.help: Changes the color theme of the text inside the notification.
